entries.root_cause: Model wrote localStorage.setItem/getItem for persistence; WebView blocks these in some configurations and they are banned by spec.
entries.fix_template: Remove every localStorage/sessionStorage/cookie/indexedDB reference. The game must hold state only in memory; persistence is handled by Flutter via the bridge.

entries.root_cause: Model called reportComplete at session end but skipped reportSummary, so Flutter cannot render the per-concept breakdown screen.
entries.fix_template: In the finish() function (or wherever the game ends), call window.EduMindAPI.reportSummary(engine.buildSummary()) BEFORE window.EduMindAPI.reportComplete(...). Both must fire, in that order.

entries.root_cause: Model added a 4th scene (LoadingScene or BetweenLevelScene). Spec requires exactly Menu/Game/End and forbids inter-level scene transitions.
entries.fix_template: Delete the extra scene class. Move any logic into GameScene as a private method that runs between levels (e.g. via this.time.delayedCall).

entries.root_cause: Model hand-rolled a score display with scene.add.text. Templates must use the shared HUD primitive.
entries.fix_template: Replace the custom score text and its update calls with: const score = window.EduCore.makeScoreHud(this, 24, 24); ... score.add(10);

entries.root_cause: Model produced only 3 levels in the spec. Engine requires exactly 5.
entries.fix_template: Re-emit the spec with 5 levels, monotonic difficulty, each ≥3 content items, total ≥25 items.

entries.root_cause: Total content items across 5 levels is below 25, breaking the adaptive variety guarantee.
entries.fix_template: Add more content items to the levels with the fewest. Aim for at least 5 items per level on average. Each must have a distinct prompt and an explanationOnWrong.

entries.root_cause: A content item has an empty concepts[] array. Concept mastery cannot be tracked without at least one tag.
entries.fix_template: Re-emit the offending items with concepts: [<existing concept id>]. If the item teaches a new sub-skill, add a new concept to spec.concepts first.

entries.root_cause: Model wired this.input.keyboard or a document key listener. WebView on Android often blocks soft keyboard events; touch is the only supported input.
entries.fix_template: Remove all keyboard listeners. Replace with on-screen buttons via Phaser shapes + setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true }).

entries.root_cause: setTintFill was removed in Phaser 4. The replacement is setTint(color) + setTintMode(Phaser.Display.TintMode.FILL).
entries.fix_template: Replace .setTintFill(0xRRGGBB) with .setTint(0xRRGGBB).setTintMode(1).

entries.root_cause: Arabic spec used raw scene.add.text(...) without rtl:true, breaking glyph shaping and direction.
entries.fix_template: Replace every scene.add.text(x,y,str,opts) with window.EduCore.addText(this, x, y, str, opts). EduCore.addText injects rtl:true automatically when language is 'ar'.

entries.root_cause: Text style fontSize below the legal minimum (24px EN, 28px AR). Small text is illegible on phone screens for grades 7-12.
entries.fix_template: Raise every fontSize: '<n>px' to at least 24px (English) or 28px (Arabic). Use wordWrap to avoid overflow rather than shrinking text.

entries.root_cause: Generated code uses no GameFeel.* methods. The runtime ships a juice library — score popups, particle bursts, screen shake, audio variety, level transitions — and the model is required to use it.
entries.fix_template: Add at least 5 GameFeel calls across the game using ≥3 distinct methods. At minimum: GameFeel.levelStart at the start of each level, GameFeel.scorePopup on every correct answer, GameFeel.celebrate at the end of correct streaks, GameFeel.punish on wrong answers, GameFeel.levelEnd between levels. Audio: GameFeel.audio.correctChain(comboCount) instead of repeated correct beeps.

entries.root_cause: The model called GameFeel methods but only a single method, two times. Need at least 5 calls and 3 distinct methods to satisfy the juice budget.
entries.fix_template: Diversify GameFeel usage: per-correct popup (scorePopup), per-wrong punish (punish), per-level intro/end (levelStart/levelEnd), audio variety per archetype (engineRev for racing, crowdCheer for sports, swordSlash for fantasy), and at least one screen-level effect per level (shake/flash/zoomPunch).

entries.root_cause: Generated code references EduSprites.library.player but the sprite manifest doesn't carry that role for the chosen theme. Either the manifest omitted it or the code typo'd the role.
entries.fix_template: Cross-check every EduSprites.library.<role> reference against the roles passed by the backend (see the SPRITE_ROLES comment block injected at the top of the script). Use only listed roles. If the role you need isn't there, fall back to drawing a Phaser.Graphics primitive.

entries.root_cause: A generated sprite base64 string is over 250KB; combined with the rest of the bundle this pushes the HTML over the 2MB response cap.
entries.fix_template: Drop the largest generated sprites from the manifest and let the code fall back to label-only answer panels. Future improvement: re-encode at lower JPEG quality before storing.

entries.root_cause: Image generation provider returned no images for any concept in the game (provider down, rate-limited, or all generations failed safety check). Generated game still must render.
entries.fix_template: When EduSprites.generated[conceptId] is undefined, render the concept label as text inside the answer panel instead of an image. Don't crash; don't skip the question.

entries.root_cause: Model added a Google Fonts <link> or @import. Banned: WebView may run offline and external fetches add latency and tracking. Arabic font is already inlined.
entries.fix_template: Delete any <link href="https://fonts..."> tags and any CSS @import for fonts. Use the inlined 'NotoArabic' family or system-ui.

entries.root_cause: Auto-captured: Found shape 3x3 < 44px
entries.fix_template:

UNKNOWN — diagnose and fix.
